entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important component of the national food supply in Malawi, providing nutritional value, cash, and soil enrichment.

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: The country where groundnut production and competitiveness are being assessed.

entities.name: POLICY ANALYSIS MATRIX
entities.description: A methodology used to analyze the private and social profitability of groundnut production.

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The process by which groundnut enriches the soil with nitrogen.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The volume of groundnut produced, which has been low due to the use of unimproved seeds.

entities.name: UNIMPROVED SEED
entities.description: Seeds that have not been improved, contributing to low average yields.

entities.name: PROTECTIONIST POLICIES
entities.description: Policies that would raise domestic groundnut prices above import parity prices.

entities.name: IMPORT PARITY PRICES
entities.description: Prices determined in world markets used as a benchmark for domestic price analysis.
